---
title: "Logic Labs"
format:
  html:
    css: lab.css
---

::: {.lab-nav}
[Logic Labs](index.qmd) | [Lab 1](lab1.qmd) | [Lab 2](lab2.qmd) | [Lab 3](lab3.qmd) | [Lab 4](lab4.qmd) | [Lab 5](lab5.qmd) | [Lab 6](lab6.qmd)
:::

::: {.lab-grid}
::: {.lab-card}
### Combinational Logic
- [Lab 1: Say my Student Number](lab1.qmd)
- [Lab 2: Analog Sticks](lab2.qmd)
- [Lab 3: ALU Flags](lab3.qmd)
:::
::: {.lab-card}
### Sequential Logic
- [Lab 4: Flip-flop Flavors](lab4.qmd)
- [Lab 5: Moving Dot](lab5.qmd)
- [Lab 6: Keyboard](lab6.qmd)
:::
:::
